channel.title: Comments on: Episode 12 – Sam Adams Octoberfest
channel.description: Beer America TV is the first beer web site dedicated to the specialty craft brewing world with video on industry experts and insiders plus more!

item.title: By: Paul
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description: I don't know how well it holds up over time, but I guess if you can still get it in May, I bet it would still be good. Does anyone have any experience saving Sam Adams beer over time and how well it ages?
item.content:encoded: I don’t know how well it holds up over time, but I guess if you can still get it in May, I bet it would still be good. Does anyone have any experience saving Sam Adams beer over time and how well it ages?

item.title: By: andrewt248
item.dc:creator: andrewt248
item.description: Sam's Octoberfest is a great taste of the German (Münich) malt/decoction mash/lager flavors. Very much like slightly sweet toast. Pick up some of this brew if you can and while it lasts.
item.content:encoded: Sam’s Octoberfest is a great taste of the German (Münich) malt/decoction mash/lager flavors. Very much like slightly sweet toast. Pick up some of this brew if you can and while it lasts.

item.title: By: marilynn ward-tluszcz
item.dc:creator: marilynn ward-tluszcz
item.description:
great great info! john is fabulous!
here's a shout out from your peeps in Frederick!
m-
item.content:encoded:
great great info! john is fabulous!

here’s a shout out from your peeps in Frederick!

m-

item.title: By: Killian Jack
item.dc:creator: Killian Jack
item.description: Definitely my favorite time of year for beer!
item.content:encoded: Definitely my favorite time of year for beer!
